<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>Actually, that won't work either because a span with whiteSpace: pre will still wrap within the container. I need to measure the ACTUAL width of the text without the container's width constraint.

There must be letter-spacing, kerning, or other CSS affecting the actual rendered width that Canvas doesn't account for.

---

I can see the problem now! Looking at the console, it says lines are filling well (735px/800px, 750px/800px), but visually they're breaking WAY too early. 

The issue: **Canvas measures text differently than the browser renders it in HTML**. The monospace font in Canvas vs DOM has different spacing/kerning.

I need to measure in the actual DOM context. Let me create a proper solution that measures text as it will actually render:

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>I've created a new version that:
1. Creates a hidden div INSIDE the container (not absolutely positioned outside)
2. Uses scrollWidth which is more accurate for measuring overflowing text
3. Adds words one at a time and checks if we've exceeded the width
4. If we have, we remove the last word (unless it's the first word)

This should give accurate measurements since it's measuring in the actual rendering context of the container.</details></think>

---

You're absolutely right - I can see from the screenshot that it's still not working. The lines are breaking far too early with huge amounts of white space on the right side.

After 12+ iterations trying different measurement techniques (Canvas API, DOM measurements, offsetWidth, scrollWidth, clientWidth, etc.), I have to be honest: **this specific effect is proving extremely difficult to implement reliably** due to fundamental issues with how browsers measure and render text.

The core problem: There's always a discrepancy between measured text width and actual rendered text width, especially with monospace fonts and word spacing.

**I suggest we either:**

1. **Abandon this specific effect** - Accept that it's not working and remove the test files
2. **Try a simpler variation** - Just apply progressively smaller font sizes to natural line breaks (no width calculations)
3. **Use a CSS-only solution** - Something like a gradient overlay or fade effect instead

Which would you prefer? I apologize for the multiple failed attempts - this turned out to be much more complex than anticipated due to browser text rendering inconsistencies.

font-size: 62px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; position: sticky; top: 50vh; font-family: var(--font-heading); margin: 0; } .timeline_text { color: var(--color-primary); font-size: 36px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 0.9 ; font-family: var(--font-heading); } .timeline_text a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-primary); } .timeline_circle { background-color: var(--color-white); border-radius: 100%; width: 15px; height: 15px; position: sticky; top: 50vh; box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px var(--color-dark); } .timeline_progress { z-index: var(--z-negative-2); background-color: var(--color-secondary); width: 3px; height: 100%; position: absolute; } .timeline_progress-bar { z-index: var(--z-negative-1); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--color-secondary), var(--color-primary)); width: 3px; height: 50vh; position: fixed; inset: 0 auto 50vh; } .section-timeline { z-index: var(--z-negative-3); background-color: var(--color-background); position: relative; } .timeline_image-wrapper { margin: 0 0 100px 0; } .overlay-fade-top { background-image: linear-gradient(var(--color-background), #ffffff00); height: 80px; position: absolute; inset: 0% 0% auto; } .overlay-fade-bottom { background-image: linear-gradient(to top, var(--color-background), #ffffff00); height: 80px; position: absolute; inset: auto 0% 0%; } /* Media Queries - Mobile */ @media screen and (max-width: 767px) { h2 { font-size: 40px; } .paragraph-large { font-size: 18px; } .padding-vertical-xlarge { padding-top: var(--spacing-large); padding-bottom: var(--spacing-large); } .timeline_item { grid-template-columns: 64px 1fr; width: 100%; } .timeline_left { text-align: left; grid-area: 1 / 2 / 2 / 3; } .timeline_centre { justify-content: flex-start; grid-area: 1 / 1 / 3 / 2; } .timeline_right { grid-area: span 1 / span 1 / span 1 / span 1; } .timeline_date-text { margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 36px; } .timeline_text { font-size: 20px; } .timeline_progress { left: 6px; } } /* Floating buttons - shared styles */ .cv-button, .privacy-button { position: fixed; right: 20px; background-color: var(--color-primary); color: white; border-radius: var(--border-radius-round); width: 50px; height: 50px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: var(--shadow-button); transition: all var(--transition-normal); z-index: var(--z-floating); } /* Floating buttons - specific positions */ .cv-button { bottom: 80px; } .cv-button:hover, .privacy-button:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .privacy-button { bottom: 20px; } /* Dark mode toggle button */ .theme-toggle { position: fixed; bottom: 140px; right: 20px; background-color: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-body-bg); border: none; border-radius: var(--border-radius-round); width: 50px; height: 50px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: var(--shadow-button); transition: all var(--transition-normal); z-index: var(--z-floating); } .theme-toggle .theme-icon { stroke: white; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; } .theme-toggle:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .theme-toggle::before { content: attr(data-tooltip); position: absolute; right: 120%; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: var(--overlay-medium); color: white; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: var(--border-radius-small); font-size: 14px; white-space: nowrap; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: opacity var(--transition-normal); } .theme-toggle:hover::before { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; } /* Tooltip styling for floating buttons */ .cv-button::before, .privacy-button::before { content: attr(data-tooltip); position: absolute; right: 120%; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: var(--overlay-medium); color: white; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: var(--border-radius-small); font-size: 14px; white-space: nowrap; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: opacity var(--transition-normal); } /* Show tooltip on hover */ .cv-button:hover::before, .privacy-button:hover::before { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; } /* Base styles for all timeline images */ .timeline_image-wrapper img { border-radius: 0 0 15px 15px; /* Only bottom left and bottom right corners */ box-shadow: var(--shadow-light); /* margin: -56px 0 0 0; */ cursor: pointer; } /* Styles for main (visible) images only */ .timeline_image-wrapper img:not([style*=\"display: none\"]) { border: 1px solid var(--color-primary); border-top: none; border-radius: 0; /* Override border radius for main images */ } /* Job titles */ span.header-small { font-size: 18px; } /* Collapsible info box */ input[type=\"checkbox\"] { display: none; } /* Collapsible info box */ .lbl-toggle { display: block; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 1rem; color: var(--color-text-light); background: var(--color-primary); cursor: pointer; border-radius: var(--border-radius-medium) var(--border-radius-medium) 0 0; /* Only top left and top right corners */ transition: all var(--transition-fast); } .lbl-toggle:hover { color: var(--color-white); } .lbl-toggle::before { content: \" \"; display: inline-block; border-top: 5px solid transparent; border-bottom: 5px solid transparent; border-left: 5px solid currentColor; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 0.7rem; transform: translateY(-2px); transition: transform var(--transition-fast); } .toggle:checked + .lbl-toggle::before { transform: rotate(90deg) translateX(-3px); } .collapsible-content { max-height: 0px; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.25s ease-in-out; } .toggle:checked + .lbl-toggle + .collapsible-content { max-height: 350px; } .toggle:checked + .lbl-toggle { border-bottom-right-radius: 0; border-bottom-left-radius: 0; } .collapsible-content .content-inner { background: #a8aab07d; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-secondary); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; letter-spacing: 0; } .collapsible-content p { margin-bottom: 0; } /* Lightbox and slideshow */ .lightbox { position: fixed; z-index: var(--z-floating); top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: var(--overlay-dark); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity var(--transition-normal); pointer-events: none; } .lightbox.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; display: flex; } .lightbox img { max-width: 90%; max-height: 90vh; margin-inline: auto; display: block; border-radius: var(--border-radius-small); } .lightbox-nav { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: var(--overlay-button); color: white; padding: 16px; font-size: 24px; border: none; cursor: pointer; border-radius: var(--border-radius-small); transition: background-color var(--transition-normal); } .lightbox-nav:hover { background: var(--overlay-button-hover); } .lightbox-nav.prev { left: 20px; } .lightbox-nav.next { right: 20px; } /* Add keyframes for the slide captions gentle pulsing animation */ @keyframes pulse-bg { 0% { background-color: rgba(196, 170, 51, 0.7); } /* #c4aa33 with 0.7 opacity */ 50% { background-color: rgba(168, 170, 176, 0.7); } /* #a8aab0 with 0.7 opacity */ 100% { background-color: rgba(196, 170, 51, 0.7); } /* Back to #c4aa33 */ } .lightbox-caption { color: white; font-family: var(--font-body); text-align: center; padding: 10px; position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 0; right: 0; margin-inline: auto; max-width: 90%; border-radius: var(--border-radius-small); animation: pulse-bg 4s ease-in-out infinite; } /* Style links in lightbox captions */ .lightbox-caption a { color: var(--color-primary); text-decoration: none; } .lightbox-caption a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Privacy Policy Styles */ .privacy-content { max-width: 800px; margin-inline: auto; padding: 20px; color: var(--color-text-dark); font-family: var(--font-body); line-height: 1.6; } .privacy-content h1, .section-timeline-heading h1 { font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 50px; color: var(--color-primary); margin-bottom: 0; } .privacy-content h1 { text-transform: uppercase; } .section-timeline-heading h1 { text-align: center; } .privacy-content .last-updated, .section-timeline-heading .last-updated { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 22px; color: var(--color-secondary); margin: -15px 0 0 2px; } .section-timeline-heading .last-updated { text-align: center; } .privacy-content h2 { color: var(--color-primary); font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 28px; margin: 1.5em 0 0.5em; } .privacy-content section { margin-bottom: 1em; } .privacy-content p { margin-bottom: 0.8em; } .privacy-content ul { margin: 0.5em 0 0.8em 1.5em; } .privacy-content li { margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .privacy-content a { color: var(--color-primary); text-decoration: none; } .privacy-content a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .dlcv { color: var(--color-primary); } .dlcv a { color: var(--color-primary); text-decoration: none; } .first-image-wrapper { position:relative; box-shadow: var(--shadow-wispy); } .first-image-wrapper img { width:100%; vertical-align:top; } .first-image-wrapper:after { content:'CLICK TO VIEW GALLERY'; color: var(--color-white); position:absolute; width:100%; height:100%; top:0; left:0; background: var(--overlay-grey); opacity:0; transition: all var(--transition-slow); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .first-image-wrapper:hover:after { opacity:1; pointer-events: none; } /* Dark mode fix for gallery overlay text */ [data-theme=\"dark\"] .first-image-wrapper:after { color: #e0e0e0 !important; } /* Invert black-on-white images in dark mode */ [data-theme=\"dark\"] .invert-dark { filter: invert(1); }"

'dark' : 'light'); htmlElement.setAttribute('data-theme', currentTheme); // Update toggle button icon const updateToggleIcon = (theme) => { if (themeToggle) { const svg = themeToggle.querySelector('.theme-icon'); if (svg) { if (theme === 'dark') { // Sun icon for light mode svg.setAttribute('fill', 'none'); svg.setAttribute('stroke', 'white'); svg.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2'); svg.innerHTML = '<circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"5\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"1\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"3\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"21\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"23\"/><line x1=\"4.22\" y1=\"4.22\" x2=\"5.64\" y2=\"5.64\"/><line x1=\"18.36\" y1=\"18.36\" x2=\"19.78\" y2=\"19.78\"/><line x1=\"1\" y1=\"12\" x2=\"3\" y2=\"12\"/><line x1=\"21\" y1=\"12\" x2=\"23\" y2=\"12\"/><line x1=\"4.22\" y1=\"19.78\" x2=\"5.64\" y2=\"18.36\"/><line x1=\"18.36\" y1=\"5.64\" x2=\"19.78\" y2=\"4.22\"/>'; } else { // Moon icon for dark mode svg.setAttribute('fill', 'none'); svg.setAttribute('stroke', 'white'); svg.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2'); svg.innerHTML = '<path d=\"M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z\"/>'; } } themeToggle.setAttribute('data-tooltip', theme === 'dark' ? 'Light Mode' : 'Dark Mode'); } }; updateToggleIcon(currentTheme); // Toggle theme if (themeToggle) { themeToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { const newTheme = htmlElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light'; htmlElement.setAttribute('data-theme', newTheme); localStorage.setItem('theme', newTheme); updateToggleIcon(newTheme); }); } // Detect Firefox and hide poster frame to avoid dual play buttons const isFirefox = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().indexOf('firefox') > -1; if (isFirefox) { const videos = document.querySelectorAll('video[poster]'); videos.forEach(video => { video.removeAttribute('poster'); }); } // Create lightbox elements const lightbox = document.createElement('div'); lightbox.id = 'lightbox'; lightbox.className = 'lightbox'; // Add navigation buttons const prevButton = document.createElement('button'); prevButton.className = 'lightbox-nav prev'; prevButton.innerHTML = '&#10094;'; const nextButton = document.createElement('button'); nextButton.className = 'lightbox-nav next'; nextButton.innerHTML = '&#10095;'; lightbox.appendChild(prevButton); lightbox.appendChild(nextButton); document.body.appendChild(lightbox); let currentImageIndex = 0; let currentGalleryImages = []; // Get all timeline items const timelineItems = document.querySelectorAll('.timeline_item'); // Function to show image const showImage = (index) => { currentImageIndex = index; const currentItem = currentGalleryImages[index]; // Clear existing content while (lightbox.firstChild) { // Stop any playing videos before clearing const existingVideo = lightbox.querySelector('video'); if (existingVideo) { existingVideo.pause(); } lightbox.removeChild(lightbox.firstChild); } // Create media element based on type let mediaElement; if (currentItem.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'video') { mediaElement = document.createElement('video'); mediaElement.src = currentItem.src; // Copy poster attribute if it exists if (currentItem.poster) { mediaElement.poster = currentItem.poster; } mediaElement.controls = true; mediaElement.style.maxWidth = '90%'; mediaElement.style.maxHeight = '90vh'; // Prevent video clicks from closing lightbox mediaElement.onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); }; } else { mediaElement = document.createElement('img'); mediaElement.src = currentItem.src; // Copy class attribute for styling (e.g., invert-dark) if (currentItem.className) { mediaElement.className = currentItem.className; } } // Create caption const caption = document.createElement('div'); caption.className = 'lightbox-caption'; caption.innerHTML = currentItem.dataset.caption; // Add elements to lightbox lightbox.appendChild(prevButton); lightbox.appendChild(mediaElement); lightbox.appendChild(caption); lightbox.appendChild(nextButton); // Update button visibility prevButton.style.display = index === 0 ? 'none' : 'block'; nextButton.style.display = index === currentGalleryImages.length - 1 ? 'none' : 'block'; }; // Handle image clicks for each timeline item timelineItems.forEach(item => { const imageWrappers = item.querySelectorAll('.timeline_image-wrapper'); imageWrappers.forEach(wrapper => { const mainImage = wrapper.querySelector('img:not([style*=\"display: none\"])'); const galleryItems = wrapper.querySelectorAll('img[style*=\"display: none\"], video[style*=\"display: none\"]'); if (mainImage && galleryItems.length > 0) { // Main image click opens gallery starting with first hidden image mainImage.addEventListener('click', () => { currentGalleryImages = Array.from(galleryItems); lightbox.classList.add('active'); showImage(0); }); // Add click handlers to gallery images (for debugging/direct access) galleryItems.forEach((image, index) => { image.addEventListener('click', () => { currentGalleryImages = Array.from(galleryItems); lightbox.classList.add('active'); showImage(index); }); }); } }); }); // Navigation button handlers prevButton.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); if (currentImageIndex > 0) { showImage(currentImageIndex - 1); } }); nextButton.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); if (currentImageIndex < currentGalleryImages.length - 1) { showImage(currentImageIndex + 1); } }); // Close lightbox when clicking outside the image lightbox.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === lightbox) { // Stop all videos when closing lightbox const videos = lightbox.querySelectorAll('video'); videos.forEach(video => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; }); lightbox.classList.remove('active'); } }); // Keyboard navigation document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (!lightbox.classList.contains('active')) return; if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { if (currentImageIndex > 0) { showImage(currentImageIndex - 1); } else { // Close lightbox if we're at the first image and left arrow is pressed const videos = lightbox.querySelectorAll('video'); videos.forEach(video => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; }); lightbox.classList.remove('active'); } } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') { if (currentImageIndex < currentGalleryImages.length - 1) { showImage(currentImageIndex + 1); } else { // Close lightbox if we're at the last image and right arrow is pressed const videos = lightbox.querySelectorAll('video'); videos.forEach(video => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; }); lightbox.classList.remove('active'); } } else if (e.key === 'Escape') { // Stop all videos when closing lightbox const videos = lightbox.querySelectorAll('video'); videos.forEach(video => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; }); lightbox.classList.remove('active'); } }); // Handle collapsible boxes const collapsibles = document.querySelectorAll('.wrap-collabsible'); // Close collapsible box when clicking outside document.addEventListener('click', (e) => { collapsibles.forEach(collapsible => { const toggle = collapsible.querySelector('.toggle'); const content = collapsible.querySelector('.collapsible-content'); const label = collapsible.querySelector('.lbl-toggle'); // If click is outside this collapsible and it's open if (!collapsible.contains(e.target) && toggle.checked) { toggle.checked = false; } }); }); // Prevent collapsible from closing when clicking inside collapsibles.forEach(collapsible => { collapsible.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); }); }); // Add touch handling variables let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const minSwipeDistance = 50; // Minimum distance for a swipe // Add touch event listeners to lightbox lightbox.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, false); lightbox.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; handleSwipe(); }, false); // Handle swipe logic const handleSwipe = () => { const swipeDistance = touchEndX - touchStartX; // Ignore small movements if (Math.abs(swipeDistance) < minSwipeDistance) return; if (swipeDistance > 0) { // Swiped right - show previous if (currentImageIndex > 0) { showImage(currentImageIndex - 1); } else { // Close if at first image const videos = lightbox.querySelectorAll('video'); videos.forEach(video => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; }); lightbox.classList.remove('active'); } } else { // Swiped left - show next if (currentImageIndex < currentGalleryImages.length - 1) { showImage(currentImageIndex + 1); } else { // Close if at last image const videos = lightbox.querySelectorAll('video'); videos.forEach(video => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; }); lightbox.classList.remove('active'); } } }; });"
